goal: Refresh the current v0 release blocker evidence using the existing recertification runner with host Docker access, so Docker-related blockers reflect the real host state rather than sandbox permission denial, without changing release policy or claiming GO.
head: 70e0c55
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may refresh current NOT_GO review artifacts by running the existing recertification runner with host Docker access, update WORKING.md, and update this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Host Docker daemon is reachable during the recertification run
Docker-related blockers reflect actual missing image/base-image state rather than sandbox permission denial
Current v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC and v0 remain NOT_GO until real trained CUDA adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.
This gate only refreshes evidence using existing strict checks; it does not edit release review docs or verifier acceptance criteria.

phase_notes.plan: Refresh release-blocker evidence with host Docker access.
phase_notes.audit: The last recertification was valid but recorded sandbox permission denial for Docker image checks; docker ps shows host Docker is reachable.
phase_notes.build: Run the existing recertification runner with host Docker access and update current NOT_GO artifacts.
phase_notes.check: Host-access recertification and bootstrap verification passed; Docker daemon is reachable, mib-export:test is missing, and v0 remains expected NOT_GO.
phase_notes.done: Ready to stage, run git diff --cached --check, commit, and push this verified evidence refresh.

pabcd.approved_scope: Host-access refresh of current NOT_GO release-blocker artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
